strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple production systems
Proven ability to lead and contribute to complex systems including AI-agent infrastructure and GIS platforms
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical education, demonstrating communication and initiative
concerns: Job titles suggest senior-level roles (e.g., Staff Software Engineer) inconsistent with entry-level position requirements
Limited evidence of direct experience with PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or renewable energy/construction tech domains
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: The candidate brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript and modern web architectures with a strong engineering mindset, but his senior-level background and lack of domain alignment with renewable energy, combined with limited German proficiency, raise questions about fit for an entry-level, on-site role.
